S.FORM: = Sbcuran 肚子鼓鼓的,有蛔蟲. = Ex: Ga sbcuran laqi ga. 詞根:bicur 蚯蚓
S.PHON: = sbʦuɾan *****,***. = əx: ga sbʦuɾan laqi ga. **:biʦuɾ **

S.PHON: = sbʦuɾan *****,***. = əx: ga sbʦuɾan laqi ga. **:biʦuɾ **
